candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be a component within the already selected parent bucket 'Cost of Revenues - Total' rather than a separate same-level expense to add on top.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of Revenues - Total'. 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues' appears embedded within that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: This is an explicit SG&A-related D&A line, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent row 'Selling Expenses', not a separate same-level expense to add later.
This is an explicit SG&A-related D&A line, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent row 'Administrative Expenses', not a separate same-level expense to add later.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of '[Income Statement] Selling Expenses' and '[Income Statement] Administrative Expenses'. The D&A rows for selling and administrative expenses appear nested within those selected buckets, so they should not be added separately. No separate R&D expense row is selected in XRD, and no explicit 'Amortization in R&D' row is present in the excerpt.
